title: Array Technologies Q3 2022 Earnings Preview
text: Consensus EPS estimate was $0.10 and consensus revenue estimate was $396.93M, representing 106.6% year-over-year growth. Over preceding year, ARRY beat EPS estimates 75% of time and beat revenue estimates 75% of time. Following Q3 results, company expected full year 2022 revenue to be in range of $1.5 billion to $1.6 billion. Modestly raised lower end of adjusted EBITDA range to $122 million and narrowed high end to $132 million. Increased adjusted net income per common share to range of $0.32 to $0.37.
